note: Same firmware family as frontlight (node 0x87), recompiled for node 0x88. App layer recovered from undisassembled gap 0x340a-0x4835. Classified via 8-agent workflow with frontlight fingerprints.

vanmoof.name: rearlight_render_frame
vanmoof.role: LED frame/animation renderer (gamma LUT, master brightness, drives 20 LEDs)

vanmoof.name: rearlight_led_channel_write
vanmoof.role: per-channel LED PWM/SCTimer write (mutex + callback 0x15e0 + output enable)

vanmoof.name: rearlight_frame_table_store
vanmoof.role: store an LED frame (overflow log code 0xb2)

vanmoof.name: rearlight_led_task
vanmoof.role: LED driver task body (SCTimer/PWM HW bring-up + frame loop); borderline-vendor

differences_from_frontlight.no_pwm_set_duty: rearlight render does not call a pwm_set_duty (confirmed via callees); LED duty is per-channel only
differences_from_frontlight.od_trio: exposes secret(0x87)/key(0x91)/8808 OD functions (like elock); frontlight flagged only the secret
